rule_name: Container With A hostPath Mount Created

text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pods%' AND UTF8(payload) LIKE '%' AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping) SIGMA Title: Container With A hostPath Mount Created SIGMA Description: Detects creation of a container with a hostPath mount. A hostPath volume mounts a directory or a file from the node to the container. Attackers who have permissions to create a new pod in the cluster may create one with a writable hostPath volume and chroot to escape to the underlying node.   False positives: - The DaemonSet controller creates pods with hostPath volumes within the kube-system namespace.  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: Container With A hostPath Mount Created
